title: ViewModelChanger
description: Allows you to configure the viewmodel with a custom position, rotation, scale, and swing.
body:
# ViewModelChanger

A simple view model changer mod for 1.21.11 that does exactly what it says and nothing more.

## Features
- Main switch for all features
- Position offset in X, Y, and Z coordinates.
- Scaling in X, Y, and Z coordinates.
- Rotation in X, Y, and Z coordinates.
- Swing direction multiplier in X, Y, and Z coordinates.
- Ability to apply features to hand.
- Ability to disable item equip animation.
- /viewmodelchanger command to bring up the settings GUI.

![Settings menu showing all of the features.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65a49a48200583a8945b21faf516d9ab25440738.png)
